statement.markdown: Solve the problem and fix the bugs.
statement.inputFormat: 1st line count, 2nd line input parameters (e.g. board size, initial position)
statement.outputFormat: Number of ways to place n queens
statement.notes: Note: You may assume 8 queens problem. However, do not limit your implementation to this problem.

hints.text: Backtracking should be applied when placing queens

editorial.dryRun: Step-by-step dry run for NQueens II
